system.description: This is used to punch, elbow, palm strike and even to head-butt your foe. Attacks made using this skill have no reach and do Muscle -1d10 for Damage. When using Arm Strike, roll against the target's Parry. On a Success you can roll damage against their Hardiness as usual.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 1: Skills
